name: Maddie Synths
author: maddie
description: VCV Rack ports of the maddie-synths eurorack firmwares.

modules.name: Butterfly
modules.description: Lorenz attractor chaotic CV generator. Port of the mod1-butterfly firmware.

modules.name: Claves
modules.description: Tunable claves / woodblock percussion voice with sine-triangle morph and 1V/Oct pitch. Port of the mod2-claves firmware.

modules.name: EG
modules.description: 3-output AR envelope generator with end-of-cycle gate. Port of the mod1-eg firmware.

modules.name: Dual AD
modules.description: Dual attack-decay envelope generator with shared time controls and per-trigger random variation. Port of the mod1-dual-ad-env firmware.

modules.name: LFO
modules.description: Multi-waveform LFO (sine, triangle, square, saw, reverse-saw, DC) with CV over rate, wave and level. Port of the mod1-lfo firmware.

modules.name: Euclidean
modules.description: 8/16-step Euclidean rhythm sequencer with probability gating. Port of the mod1-euclidean firmware.

modules.name: Logic Pair
modules.description: Dual boolean-logic gate processor (AND/OR/XOR/compare/max-min/flip-flop) on two gate/CV inputs. Port of the mod1-logic-pair firmware.

modules.name: Random CV
modules.description: Periodic random CV sequencer with selectable step length and gate probability. Port of the mod1-random-cv firmware.

modules.name: Rnd Walk + Lag
modules.description: Random walk CV generator with exponentially-lagged follower output and gravity mode. Port of the mod1-random-lag firmware.

modules.name: Trig Burst
modules.description: Clock-syncable trigger burst generator: fires N triggers at a clock-divided interval on each input trigger. Port of the mod1-trigger-burst firmware.

modules.name: Tap Tempo
modules.description: 4-output tap-tempo master clock with fixed and variable multiply and two divide outputs. Port of the mod1-tap-tempo firmware.

modules.name: Terrain LFO
modules.description: Procedurally generated triple-wavetable chaotic LFO with detuned outputs and probabilistic slow-mo. Port of the mod1-terrain-lfo firmware.

modules.name: VCO
modules.description: Six-waveform PolyBLEP oscillator (sine/tri/square/saw/FM) with 1V/Oct and octave shift. Port of the mod2-vco firmware.

modules.name: Square VCO
modules.description: Square-wave VCO with sine-LFO vibrato and chiptune octave-toggle mode. Port of the mod2-square_vco firmware.

modules.name: Clap
modules.description: TR-808-style hand-clap: band-pass filtered noise bursts with an exponential reverb tail. Port of the mod2-clap firmware.

modules.name: Hihat
modules.description: White/blue-noise hi-hat: band-pass filtered noise with adjustable decay shape. Port of the mod2-hihat firmware.

modules.name: Kick
modules.description: Sine-wave kick drum with exponential pitch sweep, soft-clip and decay. Port of the mod2-kick firmware.

modules.name: FM Drum
modules.description: Two-operator FM percussion voice (carrier+modulator FM, ratio/index/amp envelopes, tanh soft-clip). Port of the mod2-fm_drum firmware.

modules.name: Flux
modules.description: Physical-modeling / resonance multi-mode voice (modal, Karplus-Strong, noise, Lorenz, drone). Port of the mod2-flux firmware.

modules.name: Spiral
modules.description: Shepard-tone / auditory-illusion multi-mode generator (rising, falling, barber-pole, Risset, tritone, cluster, Euler). Port of the mod2-spiral firmware.
